textByHashes.6ac9e6d9fbce9f0e943db23b5755f8fc3fe4b5ec: Hello there. I am Gerardus, master cartographer. Do you have any charts of the ocean you would be willing to share with me?
textByHashes.bfffadb4cd0c2f3dd79518a6e9a4f395b08457eb: You... don't appear to have any with you.
textByHashes.7acdffdd2a8bbe9e7c4f2617d41e51b2d70d61b3: Yes, these are some fantastic charts! Please, accept these...
textByHashes.b0964d694d45157ea6305dea78ba376101abbb9f: I'm not sure, but you seem like a smart person. I'm sure you'll figure something out.
textByHashes.29b3d785661c3df80aeeedcf3ae46b4aadc55095: Hmm... these are indeed nice charts, but I'm afraid you've shown me all of these already.
textByHashes.3c45e8c063c148ffa875d28f07ae0b88b0328ca6: Well, I do have plenty of trinkets, but I suspect you've gotten all the use out of anything I could give you.
textByHashes.dd7d5d9b28618a7355af38648804730dc9b98c24: Well, over the years, while out mapping the world, I have amassed a collection of.... rare and valuable items.
textByHashes.4294562e6ceb96afb034c2baf0cbd782856c7d40: My maps are now only a few seas from completion. If you're able to help me, I will make sure you are well rewarded for your troubles. So, what do you say?
